scripts.build: cd packages/shared && npm run build && cd ../.. && cd apps/server && npm run build && cd ../.. && cd apps/client && npm run build && cd ../..
scripts.build:client: pnpm --filter shared run build && pnpm --filter client run build
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client
scripts.build:server: pnpm --filter shared run build && pnpm --filter server run build
